category_sources: Official monome docs say serialosc converts serial communication over USB into OSC for grid and arc devices.
source_facts.description says OpenSound Control server for monome devices.
display_name_sources: Official monome documentation page title is serialosc.
docs_sources: Official monome serialosc docs explain setup, operation, troubleshooting, OSC reference, and serial protocol.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/monome/serialosc; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official monome docs describe serialosc, grid, arc, USB serial communication, and OSC.
source_facts.description mentions OpenSound Control server for monome devices.
